title: A Hero's Steady Routine
article_text: After a heavy disaster, many people perceive their daily routine as tight and wet with fear. A former soldier became a hero by helping to sink a terrorist truck beside the river. He used a meter-long stick to push the vehicle, and his nose was covered in mud. He did not stare at the disaster anymore because he had already started to help. His steady pace and strong will helped him convert a sinking feeling into hope. He devoted his life to being a supporter of the poor and the weak. Some people tried to justify the terrorist's actions, but they were wrong. The man had worked as a secondary teacher before he became a welfare worker. He had recruited many young people to help with the rescue. If he had not acted quickly, the truck would have sailed into the town and caused more damage.

sentences.zh: 在一场严重的灾难之后，许多人认为他们的日常生活因恐惧而紧张且潮湿。

vocabulary.eng_def: to see or understand something in a particular way

vocabulary.eng_def: a sudden event causing great damage or loss

vocabulary.example: He walked at a fast pace.

vocabulary.eng_def: with a lot of weight or force; in a slow or difficult way

vocabulary.eng_def: to give a lot of time or effort to something
vocabulary.example: She devoted her life to teaching.

vocabulary.eng_def: a person who uses violence for political goals
vocabulary.example: The police caught the terrorist.

vocabulary.eng_def: to show that something is right or reasonable
vocabulary.example: He tried to justify his actions.

image_prompts: A scene of a disaster area with heavy rain, people looking scared and their clothes tight and wet.
A former soldier in uniform pushing a terrorist truck into the river beside the bank.
A close-up of a man using a meter-long stick to push a vehicle, his nose covered in mud.
A man turning away from a disaster scene, no longer staring, and beginning to help others.
A man walking with a steady pace, his face showing determination, converting fear into hope.
A man standing beside poor people, raising his hand as a supporter, dedicated to helping them.
A courtroom scene with a person trying to justify a terrorist's actions, but others shaking their heads.
A man in a classroom as a secondary teacher, later changing to a welfare worker helping people.
A man speaking to a group of young people, recruiting them to join a rescue team.
A truck sailing into a town, with people running away, but a man stopping it in time.
